description: Heavy duty elasticated braces, fully adjustable length with extra heavy duty wide fasteners and ideal for supporting tool belts. With their heavy duty clips, 50mm(2inch) wide elasticated straps and a double leather cross patch, these braces are more than man enough to support a tool laden industrial belt pouch or comfortable enough just to hold up your trousers.
